since_last: 61% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.52%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.75% · Gold -0.01% · Nasdaq100 +0.38%. 61% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.52%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.52%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +4.65%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +4.65%, MDB +4.38%, TER +4.25%, MRVL +4.20%, PUBM +4.12%. Laggards: ORCL -3.06%, TLN -2.61%, TSLA -2.57%, DELL -2.48%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.81% at $121.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.81% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
